audience.terminal_user: A mainland-China Shadowrocket user who already has a proxy subscription
audience.use_scenario: Reviewing a public GitHub repository before importing a routing configuration
audience.desired_belief: The configuration is transparent, mainland-first, node-independent, and manually controlled
audience.next_action: Inspect the three-step setup and import the configuration after understanding the limits

consumer_value: Mainland and local-network traffic is routed directly
ChinaMax provides broad mainland banking, payment, carrier, media, gaming, domain, and IP coverage
Critical mainland chat, WSS signaling, meeting, and recording-sync domains are routed directly before the fallback
AI, developer, overseas-work, and unmatched overseas traffic follows the manually selected home-screen node
iPhone, iPad, and macOS use the same canonical configuration file
No subscription, node, credential, HTTPS decryption, or automatic country selection is bundled
must_not_claim: Zero latency impact on every device or network
Guaranteed acceptance by every banking app
Prevention of account restrictions or platform risk controls
